login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue caring for your loved ones
login.downloadAppCta: Download the CircleCare app to get started.

errors.loginFailed: We couldn't sign you in. Please try again.

callback.error: We couldn't complete your sign-in. Please try again.

verifyOtp.title: Verify Your Email
verifyOtp.subtitle: We sent a 6-digit code to {{email}}
verifyOtp.subtitleNoEmail: Enter the email you signed up with and the 6-digit code we sent you
verifyOtp.notVerifiedNotice: Please verify your email before signing in. We've sent you a new verification code.
verifyOtp.codeSentMessage: A new verification code has been sent to your email.

errors.incompleteCode: Please enter the complete verification code

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: No worries! Enter your email and we'll send you a 6-digit code to reset your password.
forgotPassword.resetLinkSent: If an account exists for {{email}}, we've sent it a 6-digit reset code.
forgotPassword.checkSpam: Enter the code in the next screen to reset your password. If you don't see it, check your spam folder.

errors.sendFailed: Failed to send reset code. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.codeSubtitle: Enter the 6-digit code sent to {{email}} and choose a new password
resetPassword.success: Your password has been successfully reset. You can now sign in with your new password.
resetPassword.errorMessage: We couldn't find your email address. Please start the password reset process again.

errors.resetFailed: Failed to reset password. Please check your code and try again.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.passwordUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
validation.passwordLowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
validation.passwordNumber: Password must contain at least one number
validation.passwordSpecial: Password must contain at least one special character
